title: Remove dead ConsolidatedLatexLessonView component
body: The file src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ConsolidatedLatexLessonView/index.tsx is never imported anywhere and appears to be legacy dead code. It should be deleted in a follow-up to avoid confusion.
rationale: Dead code that still has the old PDF chrome styling (gradient gutter, header/footer with —/· · ·) which could confuse future developers working on scroll view.
